title: Young double-slit fringe spacing and path difference
instruction: Implement young_fringe_spacing and path_difference in interference.py. young_fringe_spacing(wavelength_m, slit_separation_m, screen_distance_m) returns the fringe spacing Delta y = lambda * L / d on a far screen. path_difference(slit_separation_m, angle_rad) returns d*sin(theta). Raise ValueError if wavelength, slit separation, or screen distance is not positive.
difficulty_rationale: Simple formulas but buggy baseline mixes units/order and skips validation.
